titleStmt.title: SII 8.714: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 714. (A.R. No. 398 of 1903). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī cakalapuvaṉa[cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī]kopperuñciṅkatevarkku yāṇṭu ru varuṣam Aiñcāva
taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟapuliyūr kaviciyaṉ civaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā(ṉ)ṉeṉ ciyaṉ tirucci
ṟaṉ nilavilai piramāṇattiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu . Iva(ṉ)ṉukku Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukuṭukkum nilamāvatu I
pakkalum vilaikoṇṭu Eṅkaḷ mutaliyār tirume
ttu Ivar Aṉupavittu Ivar Apāvattu Ivar piḷḷai
piḷḷaikaḷukku cilaper Iṟukkaveṇṭukaiy
muṭaiya vilaiyāka viṟṟu Ikkācai nāṅkaḷ
ṭallāka taraveṇum Eṉṟu Ivarkaḷ collukai
Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukuṭukkum nilam Ivvūr vaṭapiṭa
ḷamaināṭṭu paḷḷipaṭaiyāṉa vikkirama
taracoḻavatikku meṟku śrī rājarājavāykkālu
tu nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭukkum karuppaṭi Eṉṟu perkūvap
kavalli peruvaḻiāṉa Āṉāṟṟukku kiḻakkum Uṟa Ivaṉ
ñāṉacampantar maṭappuṟattukku teṟkum cuntara
vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta Innāṉke
ka mikutikuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka vanta viḷai nilamum teṉmelaimulaiyil pūna
yum vaṭakiḻaimulaiyil kuṭiiruppu nattamum māvum teṅkum puḷiyum
maraṅkaḷḷum kuḷattil Iṟaikkum cen kulaiyum nilaiyum Etta mum
mula Olaipaṭikaḷā(l)lum pottakapaṭiyā(l)lum Uḷḷa Uṭaimaikaḷu
taṉaiyum muṟṟumoḻiaṉṟi viṟṟukuṭutta nilam � I Inilam Arai
ṟṟukuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmili(i)cainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu cela
kācu Aimpatirāyiramum koṇṭeṉ koṇṭa paricāvatu [*] Eṅkaḷ pū
ḷai niccayittu Iṟukkiṟa poṉṉukku tillai nācciyār koyil śrīpaṇ
m nellum maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa Uṭalkaḷum viṟṟu Irunta taricāy vāṅkikkuṭutta
raye muṉṟumāvum viṟṟu vilaipra māṇattiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ kavuciyaṉ tirucciṟ ṟampala
kku kavicivaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā(ṉ)ṉeṉ Innilattukku Ikkācu Aimpatti
kavum Atuve poruḷ māvaṟutiporuḷ cilaolai yāvatākavum . Itu Allatu veṟu po
laolai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātākavum . Innilattukku paḻampaṭi pāyunir pāyavu
Iṟaikkum nīr Iṟaikkavum peṟuvatākavum Innilattukku pottakapaṭiyālu mu
ṭaimaikaḷum Urimaikaḷum muṟṟu moḻiviṉṟi peṟuvatākavum Innilattukku van
tittu Āḻvippataṟku Eṉ vāḻve Ācci Iṟaippuṇaiyāvatu Ākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu
pattirāyiramum muṟkuṟittapaṭiye vāṅki kuṭuttu muṟitta nilam Araiye mu
ṟu vilaippra māṇatiṭṭu kuṭutteṉ kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ civaṉ
cciṟṟampalamuṭaiya(ṉ)ṉeṉ . Ipparicu Ivar paṇikka Eḻutivittu Eḻutumuṭitteṉ Ivvūr karaṇa
llaikkūttaṉ ceṅkamalarpoṟpāta(m)māṉa taṉmappiriya(ṉ)ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
ye muṉṟumāvum viṟṟukkuṭutta kācu Aimpattirāyiramum muṟkkuṟittapaṭiye Ippoṉṉu
kaviciyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉṉeṉ Ivai Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
Ippaṭikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Ulakuṭaiyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi A
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vācciyaṉ caṅkaraṉ tillaināyakaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Eṭuttaruḷiya cipātam tillaikkaṉpaṉeṉ I
Digital edition of SII 8.714 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
